textByHashes.bfd84175c14a5d4dfdb05e04e7d468a00901c4dc: Hold the line! Under no circumstances can this castle be breached!
textByHashes.78a9697a849e89824f71b0ba24d7eb27439c1482: Did you not hear me? Hold the line!
textByHashes.89bd84352b88236cf6ce60066fac1bbe6250ad68: We serve Great Kourend! You are all in violation of the laws of this kingdom!
textByHashes.11cbf96afd3e9e0ef669adafbf7afd7765502549: As you wish, Lord Shayzien. It will be done.
textByHashes.f904fff76b2d14ebbc64d79385be9c8d4ce68361: I have to ask you to get back from here sir.
textByHashes.b945f529e72bce5e2236c3a2519bbc0336d7ef1a: I have to ask you to get back from here lady.
textByHashes.802da68a9105683bc1c17533779dea3eba635e1c: This is the Lizardman Canyon. The lizardmen from the west are desperately trying to invade Great Kourend.
textByHashes.ba8cfd6c78f1f9408bfe84a6dc72161b878be310: We were able to hold them back, so they've started tunnelling under the kingdom and into this canyon to bypass our defences.
textByHashes.7399c0ad17725e15a76acecad8dec114d673af4d: Luckily, we were able to work out what they were doing and move to stop them. So far we've managed to keep them trapped within the canyon, but we need to constantly hold them at bay.
textByHashes.045436e5db8c5beb6e6575763127d9009775b3d9: No! We would never trust a stranger in the importance of a battle! A lot is at stake.
textByHashes.d7e17c592e4852c9af76d23be8fa9acbf2432cd6: You may. Head into the canyon and take the fight to those monsters!
